title: dryopteris sphaeropteroides
intro: Dryopteris sphaeropteroides, also known as the round-leaved wood fern, is a species of fern native to eastern Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of D. sphaeropteroides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
